operation: Create a rectangular box of dimensions 20×20×10 starting from the XY workplane. Select the top face facing positive Z, create a new workplane, draw a circle of radius 5 centered at the origin, then cut this circle completely through the entire box, creating a through hole.
geometry: A rectangular block with a circular cylindrical hole cut completely through it along the vertical Z-axis, centered on the top face of the block.
function: This basic rectangular block with a centered through hole is used as a spacer or mounting block that accommodates a cylindrical shaft or fastener.
